user_system_path: Between rungs. The live product thread is the GUARDIAN (workday-presence): it fires, grounds a real commitment, and pings Slack only when it has a reviewable move. Recent shipped work: #402 (review-gated one-tap send), #404 (email draft attachments — the send carries the finished work), #407 (the generator attaches its own work — an approved write_document is delivered with its content as a real <title>.md file attachment). The remaining money-loop moves are owner-gated: flip ALLOW_APPROVAL_EMAIL_SEND to validate the real attached sends/deliveries live; configure the free external 15-min guardian cron; and (paid, needs a cost ceiling) teach the generator to compose + attach a companion document for a send_message to an external recipient. Constraint: NO paid API calls to test — prove in the harness.
allowed_files_raw: Between rungs — only control-plane + docs may change until the owner names the next seam (which re-scopes this contract).
forbidden_files_raw: No product/runtime/schema/deps changes without an active seam + scoped contract.
acceptance_condition: Control plane is consistent in the between-rungs form (build-order active_issue: none, contract active_issue: none, no active-seam line in ACTIVE_HANDOFF) and gate:continuity passes.
stop_condition: Stop when the control plane is rolled forward to a clean between-rungs state and the owner has a boot prompt for the next session.
next_command: New session: read ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md + FOLDERA_MASTER_BIBLE.md Part II-B; the owner names the next seam — likely owner-side live validation of the attached sends/deliveries (flip ALLOW_APPROVAL_EMAIL_SEND) + the external 15-min guardian cron, or the paid generator build to compose + attach a companion document for a send_message.
